problem.title: The problem every grower faces
problem.subtitle: Never get lost in your grow again.
problem.description: In the routine of cultivation, taking notes and organizing everything takes time and costs harvest. Mybud listens to your voice, organizes by plant and delivers a visual plan so you know exactly what happened and what the next step is.

timeline.title: Plant timeline
timeline.description: Days, pot changes and stages aligned in an easy-to-review and repeat timeline.

voiceNotes.subtitle: The grow journal that understands your voice. No typing, no forms — just speak naturally and let Mybud organize.

natural.title: Understands natural language
natural.description: Say "Watered Blue Dream with 500 ml" and Mybud creates the activity with all details. No forms, no endless lists.

classification.title: Automatic activity classification
classification.description: Recognizes over 25 types of tasks from your speech: watering, training, transplanting, observations — everything categorized automatically.

context.title: Smart context
context.description: Knows which are your plants and what happened recently. Mybud fills in the details automatically, making everything instant.

timeSaver.title: Save +10 minutes per day
timeSaver.description: What took 5 minutes typing now takes 10 seconds speaking. More time growing, less time noting.

cta.text: Join growers who have already saved hours of manual recording

voiceNoteDemo.tryExample: Try saying: "Watered my plants with 500 ml"

plantTimeline.subtitle: Track the entire plant cycle with a visual timeline. Never lose track of what phase your grow is in.

automatic.title: Automatic time tracking
automatic.description: Days and weeks calculated for each stage. Know exactly how long the plant has been in veg or flower.

visual.title: Simple visual progress
visual.description: See the complete plant history in an interactive timeline. Compare previous cycles and replicate the best results.

predict.title: Harvest prediction
predict.description: Based on the current stage, Mybud estimates when you'll harvest. Plan drying, curing and storage in advance.

insights.title: Your personal
insights.subtitle: A technical engine that combines over 1,000 expert rules with your cultivation data to deliver precise guidance from start to finish of every cycle.
insights.description: Combines agronomic expertise with data processing to deliver personalized insights for your plants, phases and environment.
insights.contextDescription: Guidance considers plant phase, cultivation week, environmental metrics and recent activities. It's like having a master grower watching 24/7.

byStage.title: By stage
byStage.description: Different guidance for plants in vegetative or flowering

monitoring.title: Metrics monitoring
monitoring.description: Alerts when temperature, humidity or VPD fall outside ideal range

detection.title: Problem detection
detection.description: Identifies patterns indicating stress or nutrient deficiency

learning.title: Continuous learning
learning.description: Understand why metrics matter and best practices for each phase

week6.message: Week 6 of flowering — perfect time to check trichome development

seo.title: Mybud B2B — Product usage insights that validate and boost revenue.
seo.description: From daily cultivation to strategic decisions: Mybud puts your brand inside the grower routine and shows how real cultivators use your products through actionable metrics.
seo.ogImageAlt: Mybud interface showing product usage insights and recommendations.

hero.subtitle: Your product shows up exactly when growers need it — during watering, pest detection, feeding time. Real usage insights, 100% anonymous data.
graphHighlights: Relevant content in real grow routines
hero.trustElement: Anonymous and aggregated data. Know HOW they use your products, not WHO.

problem.title: Cannabis marketing and operations are stuck.
problem.description: Restricted ads, shallow metrics, and manual reports keep brands from growing safely. Mybud changes the game—placing your brand in the grower routine and showing how cultivators actually use your products through real, ethical, traceable usage insights.

howItWorks.title: Your product appears at the right time.
howItWorks.subtitle: Real usage context, 100% anonymous data.

step1.title: Watering time? Your product appears
step1.desc: Grower opens the app to water → schedule shows your CalMag. Feeding time? Your fertilizer appears at the exact moment. All integrated into real routines.

step2.title: Detected pests? Your solution appears
step2.desc: Grower logs fungus issues → app suggests your product. Your brand positions itself exactly when cultivators need help.

step3.title: Real and anonymous usage data
step3.desc: Adherence, repurchase, and satisfaction metrics — without exposing identities. You know how cultivators use products, but not who they are. Privacy by design.

step4.title: QR code → instant schedule
step4.desc: Connected packaging directs customers straight to your product's usage protocol. Convenience that turns into repurchase.

step3Bullets: Know HOW they use, not WHO

seo.title: MyBud Collectives — Traceability and control for medicinal collective cultivation
seo.description: Operating system for associations and clubs: plant & batch traceability, team control, reports and audits. Built to scale with compliance.
seo.ogImageAlt: Mybud Collective interface showing associative cultivation management and process standardization.

hero.subtitle: An operating system for associations and clubs: plants, batches, inputs, accountability and reports — one auditable history.
hero.description: MyBud centralizes the operation and the evidence of cultivation: who did what, when, and under which batch. Less spreadsheets, more control.
hero.trustElement: Built with real associations. Your data stays under your control. Ready for audits and traceability.

positioning.title: MyBud is the operating system for collective medicinal cultivation
positioning.description: The central infrastructure where all critical information connects in one place.
positioning.details: History, handling, inputs, batches, and analyses — organized by responsibility.

context.title: Medicinal cultivation has entered a new phase
context.description: With the advancement of medicinal cannabis regulation in Brazil, associations and collective operations now need operational control, continuous traceability, and production predictability.
context.highlight: The challenge is not to cultivate. It is to prove, organize, and plan.

problems.title: The main bottlenecks of medicinal collective cultivation

items.title: Lack of continuous and reliable traceability
items.description: Without a structured system, it is impossible to track genetic origin, handling history, or link batches to lab analyses continuously.

items.title: Fragmented operation between spreadsheets, papers, and memory
items.description: Information scattered across multiple sources does not generate the structured and auditable history that regulation requires.

items.title: Production disconnected from real therapeutic demand
items.description: Without visibility of real patient demand, production becomes reactive, generating waste or product shortages.

problems.footer: Without a central control layer, any error becomes a systemic risk.

solution.title: MyBud structures what regulation requires
solution.description: MyBud organizes the collective cultivation operation from a single, continuous, and verifiable history, prepared to meet sanitary requirements, inspection, and audit.

moment.title: Medicinal cultivation regulation has advanced.
moment.description: Now, associations need real control, reliable history, and predictability — not loose notes.
moment.keyphrase: The challenge is not to cultivate.
moment.keyphrase2: It is to prove, organize, and plan.

howItWorks.title: How MyBud structures collective cultivation
howItWorks.description: Complete system that organizes all stages of medicinal cultivation in an auditable structure:

features.title: Documented genetic origin
features.description: Complete record from seed packages, germination, mother plants to clones linked to origin.

features.title: Continuous history per plant and batch
features.description: Detailed timeline with all activities, inputs applied, and responsible for each action.

features.title: Operational cultivation control
features.description: Real-time visibility of how many plants are active, in what stage, and where they are located.

features.title: Spatial operation traceability
features.description: Organization by areas, rooms, and grows with access control and permissions by profile.

features.title: Audit-ready reports
features.description: Complete data export by plant, batch, cycle, or genetics in standard formats.

targetAudience.title: Who MyBud was made for
targetAudience.description: Developed for organizations that need rigorous compliance:

audiences.title: Associations
audiences.description: Operational control and traceability for ANVISA compliance.

audiences.title: Projects
audiences.description: Scientific documentation and auditable history for research.

audiences.title: Operations
audiences.description: Any cultivation that needs to prove traceability and control.

whatItsNot.title: What MyBud is not
whatItsNot.description: To avoid incorrect expectations, it is important to clarify what MyBud does not do:

items.title: It is not a note-taking app
items.description: MyBud is a complete operational management system, not just a digital notepad.

items.title: It is not a personal grow diary
items.description: It was designed for collective operations with multiple users, permissions, and regulatory requirements.

items.title: It does not replace legal authorizations
items.description: MyBud is a management tool. It does not grant authorizations, licenses, or regulatory approvals.

featuresSummary.title: What MyBud does
featuresSummary.subtitle: MyBud functions as the operating system for collective cultivation, connecting genetics, production, and demand.

categories.title: Complete cultivation control
items: How many plants are active, vegetating or flowering

categories.title: Cannabinoid, flavonoid, terpene profile and analyses
items: Plants and batches by complete profile (THC, CBD, terpenes, flavonoids)
Import of lab and agronomic reports

categories.title: Patients and demand
items: How many patients demand CBD or THC
Cultivation planning based on real need

categories.title: API-first and integrations
items: API ready for consumption and integrations
Connection with labs, ERPs and external systems

problem.title: No history, no compliance. No compliance, no scale.
problem.description: WhatsApp, scattered spreadsheets and manual reporting break traceability. MyBud turns daily operations into a continuous, auditable record: plants, batches, inputs, accountable people and evidence.

benefits.title: Standardize without losing touch with the grow floor.
benefits.subtitle: Infrastructure, not a notes app: a single source of truth for operations.

traceability.title: Complete traceability
traceability.desc: History per plant, batch and cycle. Origin → handling → harvest → processing.

standardization.title: Standardization (SOPs)
standardization.desc: Protocols, checklists and repeatable routines to reduce variance across cycles and teams.

multiuser.title: Team & permissions
multiuser.desc: Role-based profiles (tech, operator, manager) with accountability and action logs.

dataControl.title: Data under your control
dataControl.desc: Export anytime. Evidence organized and ready to share with stakeholders.

privacy.title: Compliance & audits
privacy.desc: Audit-ready structure with logs and reports for internal and external inspections.

integration.title: Geo + integrations (optional)
integration.desc: Area-level location records (georeferencing), per-plant QR, IoT sensors and lab connections.

features.title: What regulation asks for — in one system.
features.subtitle: MyBud turns day-to-day cultivation into structured, auditable evidence.

management.title: Operational control
management.desc: Areas, plants, batches, stages, responsible people and tasks with automated alerts.

reports.title: Automated reports
reports.desc: Cycle, batch and area reports — ready for management and audit.

compliance.title: Traceability & chain of custody
compliance.desc: Every action links to plant/batch, date and responsible person — with evidence.

partners.title: Partner connections
partners.desc: Designed to integrate labs, clinics and suppliers without operational friction.

proof.title: Built with real associations.
proof.subtitle: Made by those who understand collective cultivation and compliance.

tech.title: Brazilian technology
tech.desc: Developed in Brazil with privacy by design and support in Portuguese.

community.title: Co-created with the community
community.desc: Direct feedback from cannabis associations and operational collective grows.

support.title: Guided implementation
support.desc: Implementation pilot with team training and dedicated onboarding support.

testimonial.title: Results that inspire the sector.
testimonial.text: With Mybud Collective, we standardized reports and reduced management time per grow by 60%.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: If you don't see your question here, send it in the form.

q1.q: How many plants does the system support?
q1.a: Mybud Collective is ideal for grows with 20+ plants and multiple cultivators. We support from small associations to commercial facilities.

q2.q: How does the implementation pilot work?
q2.a: We provide guided onboarding with team training, personalized setup, and dedicated support in the first weeks.

q3.a: On secure encrypted servers. You can export all data anytime.

q4.a: Yes! We work with you to adapt reports to your association's specific needs.

q5.a: Investment varies by plant count and features. Schedule a conversation to receive a personalized proposal with tiered plant plans.

whyItMatters.title: Without standards, there's no trust.

seo.title: MyBud for Brands — Your product inside the grow, not outside it
seo.description: In MyBud, your product appears inside the grower's routine. Not as an ad. As part of the process.
seo.ogImageAlt: MyBud interface showing a brand product inside a cultivation task.

hero.badge: The app growers use to grow
hero.title: your brand becomes part of the routine
hero.subtitle: week, dose, and pH appear automatically.
hero.proof: Which bottle to open, how many ml to apply, and when to do it.

reframe.title:
You don't need more visibility.
You need to be used.
reframe.punchline: If your product isn't inside the routine, it's outside the result.

presence.title: Where your brand appears:

activityLog.title: In the grow history

presence.punchline: Your product appears at the exact moment of watering.

problem.title:
Today, your brand teaches.
But doesn't follow through.
problem.intro:
The customer buys. And you lose visibility.
More consistent usage = more repurchase.
problem.pdfNote: Your dosage PDF became a paperweight.
problem.solution: We're going to turn it into the engine of the grow.
problem.narrative: They get the PPM wrong, go into overfert, burn the roots, and burn your reputation in forums and WhatsApp groups.

freeTier.title: Immediate Onboarding. Zero support.

freeTier.evolutionDesc: With a PRO activation, your customer follows your technical protocol to the letter, ensuring results and repurchase.

recommendations.title: smart recommendations

descriptions.tasks: The app tells the user: which bottle to open and how much to apply.

descriptions.recommendations: Smart nudges driving users to apply your product right now.
descriptions.hub: Your dedicated profile. Let growers import your exact feeding chart.
descriptions.calculator: We digitize your PDF feeding tables into an interactive tool.
descriptions.stickers: Let growers champion your brand by putting your stickers on their photos.

mock.suggestion: The flowering stage requires more potassium. We recommend increasing the dose of {brand} to 4ml/L starting next week.

hero.headline:
Your brand doesn't have to stop at the packaging.
It can guide the grow.
hero.subheadline: We turn your nutritional chart into a schedule inside the app, where the grower follows your brand at the right moment, with the right dose, throughout the entire cycle.

problem.headline:

but doesn't follow through.

2ml/L — Week 3

Dosage becomes a task.
Chart becomes routine.
Product becomes action.

seo.title: Mybud Enterprise — Professional management for associations and large grows
seo.description: Full control of collective cultivation with complete traceability, automatic reports, and 100% data ownership. An app scaled to your operation.
seo.ogImageAlt: Mybud Enterprise interface showing collective grow management and automated reports.

hero.subtitle: Take full control of collective cultivation — from clone to harvest — with automated reports, standardized tasks, and 100% data ownership.
hero.description: Mybud Enterprise is a dedicated version for associations, social clubs, and small facilities that need to manage dozens of plants and multiple growers with security and efficiency.
hero.trustElement: Each account is configured under your own domain, ensuring data belongs to the organization, not the platform.

benefits.title: Your data, your rules.
benefits.subtitle: Our role is to simplify, not to take over.

traceability.title: Complete traceability
traceability.desc: History per plant, batch, and patient. From clone to harvest, everything documented.

standardization.title: Process standardization
standardization.desc: Customized schedules, automated reports, and simplified internal audits.

multiuser.title: Multi-user management
multiuser.desc: Profiles for members, technicians, and doctors with specific permissions.

dataControl.title: Data under control
dataControl.desc: Dedicated storage, export anytime. Your data, your rules.

privacy.title: Total privacy
privacy.desc: No data shared without consent. Privacy-ready by design.

integration.title: Future integration
integration.desc: Environmental sensors, QR codes, ERP and compliance APIs.

features.title: Organize, standardize, and grow safely.
features.subtitle: Mybud Enterprise is the bridge between cultivation and management.

management.title: Grow and team management
management.desc: Each grow with assigned owners, tasks, protocols, and SLA alerts. Full control without complexity.

reports.title: Automated reports
reports.desc: Medical and agronomic reports in a few clicks, always ready for audit.

compliance.title: Traceability and compliance
compliance.desc: Complete history of each plant, patient, and batch to maintain compliance.

partners.title: Partner integration
partners.desc: Connect manufacturers, clinics, and labs without operational friction.

proof.title: Used by associations seeking transparency and efficiency
proof.subtitle: Built together with real growers and associations.

community.title: Community-built
community.desc: Direct feedback from associations and real large grows.

support.title: Dedicated support
support.desc: Brazilian team, fast response, and service in Portuguese.

testimonial.text: With Mybud, we standardized reports and reduced management time per grow by 60%.
testimonial.author: Beta Association

finalCta.title: Make your association more efficient.
finalCta.subtitle: Schedule a conversation and discover how Mybud Enterprise can adapt to your operation.
finalCta.description: Fill in your details and we'll get back with an initial assessment within 1 business day.
finalCta.successMessage: Received! Someone from the Mybud team will contact you within 1 business day.
finalCta.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Try again or write to comercial@mybud.app

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: If your question isn't here, let us know in the form.

q1.a: Mybud Enterprise is ideal for associations with 10+ simultaneous plants and multiple growers. For smaller grows, we recommend Mybud B2C.

q2.a: On dedicated servers under your domain. You can export everything anytime.

q3.a: Yes, we work with your team to adapt reports to specific needs.

q4.a: We're developing API integrations. Contact us to learn more.

q5.a: Pricing varies based on operation size and needs. Schedule a conversation to receive a custom proposal.

footer.unifier: MyBud grows with you — from individual cultivation to the cannabis industry.
